[Verse 1]
Just a small-town girl, livin' in a lonely world
She took the midnight train goin' anywhere
Just a city boy, born and raised in South Detroit
He took the midnight train goin' anywhere

[Verse 2]
A singer in a smoky room
The smell of wine and cheap perfume
For a smile, they can share the night
It goes on and on and on and on

[Pre-Chorus]
Strangers waitin'
Up and down the boulevard
Their shadows searchin' in the night
Streetlights, people
Livin' just to find emotion
Hidin' somewhere in the night

[Verse 3]
Workin' hard to get my fill
Everybody wants a thrill
Payin' anything to roll the dice
Just one more time

[Verse 4]
Some will win, some will lose
Some are born to sing the blues
Oh, the movie never ends
It goes on and on and on and on

Strangers waitin'
Up and down the boulevard
Their shadows searchin' in the night
Streetlights, people
Livin' just to find emotion
Hidin' somewhere in the night

Hold on to that feelin'
Streetlights, people

snippet.title: Silo — Season 3 Official Teaser | Apple TV
snippet.description:
The truth will surface. Silo returns July 3 on Apple TV https://apple.co/_Silo

“Silo” is the story of the last ten thousand people on earth, their mile-deep home protecting them from the toxic and deadly world outside. However, no one knows when or why the silo was built and those who try to find out face fatal consequences. Ferguson stars as Juliette, an engineer who seeks answers about a loved one’s murder and tumbles onto a mystery that goes far deeper than she could have ever imagined, leading her to discover that if the lies don’t kill you, the truth will.

“Silo” is produced for Apple TV by Apple Studios. The series is executive produced by Yost, Michael Dinner, Nina Jack, Joanna Thapa, Ferguson, Morten Tyldum, Howey, Fred Golan, Rémi Aubuchon and AMC Studios.

snippet.title: Evil Dead Burn | Date Announce Teaser
snippet.description:
Nowhere to hide. 🔥 #EvilDeadBurn only in theaters July 10. Full trailer coming soon.


Evil Dead Burn unleashes the franchise’s most savage and terrifying ride to date, blazing onto big screens with an all-new chapter of carnage and demonic mayhem. After the loss of her husband, a woman seeks solace with her in-laws in their secluded family home. As one by one they are transformed into Deadites—turning the gathering into a family reunion from hell—she comes to discover that the vows she took in life... live on even in death.

Director:  Sébastien Vaniček
Cast:  Souheila Yacoub, Tandi Wright, Hunter Doohan, Luciane Buchanan, Errol Shand, Maude Davey, George Pullar, Greta Van Den Brink

snippet.title: THE DARK ROOMS - VEINS | Trailer 1
snippet.description:
THE DARK ROOMS - VEINS

There is another world behind the cinema halls. Cinema complexes have hidden dark transport passageways that connect the empty halls with one another. A labyrinth of back corridors, projection rooms and dark chambers.
The exhibition leads you through this tunnel system.
At the end there are 8 large old cinema halls, some completely gutted, some with a landscape of reclining cinema seats.
In this atmosphere, international light and sound artists build their installations...

snippet.title: Ti Amo tra le Onde – Vintage Italian Love Song | Romantic 1970s - 1980s
snippet.description:
🎶 This song is available on Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube Music & all major music platforms
👉 Spotify: 
https://open.spotify.com/track/3DRd9Gl4FGAQd8zde7N4Gg?si=QJ4udbJgTF2C0wk3GZHGsA


Ti Amo tra le Onde (I Love You Among the Waves) is a romantic vintage Italian love song inspired by the warm and timeless atmosphere of 1970s Italy.

This song tells the story of a summer night by the sea — where the sound of the waves blends with whispered words of love, and every moment feels endless.

With soft nylon guitar, gentle rhythms and nostalgic melodies, Ti Amo tra le Onde captures the magic of Italian romance: moonlight on the water, quiet emotions, and two hearts moving together like the tide.

Close your eyes and imagine:
the sea, the night, and a voice softly saying… “ti amo” 🌙✨

If you love vintage Italian music, romantic retro songs and dreamy Mediterranean nights, this song is for you.

🎶 Headphones recommended for full atmosphere

snippet.title: ELİMİ TUTAN YOK - Yunus Emre YETİM
snippet.description:
"ELİMİ TUTAN YOK" adlı eserimle ilgili olarak YouTube'a asılsız bir telif hakkı ihlali bildirimi yapılmış ve platform kuralları gereği eserime geçici bir kısıtlama getirilmiştir.
Eserin tüm hakları şahsıma ait olup, bu haksız işleme karşı resmi itirazlarımızı ve hukuki süreci (karşı bildirim) an itibarıyla başlatmış bulunmaktayız. Süreç sonuçlandığında şarkımız asıl yerine geri dönecektir.
Sorun çözülene kadar bu içerik üzerinden dinlemeye devam edebilirsiniz. Bu süreçteki anlayışınız ve kesintisiz desteğiniz için çok teşekkür ederim.

#elimitutanyok #duyanyok #görenyok #yeymusic

snippet.title: GTA 6 Trailer 3: DIESER Tag ist entscheidend! (PC & Online Leaks)
snippet.description:
Der GTA 6 Trailer Nummer 3 steht kurz vor der Tür und ein ganz entscheidendes Datum rückt immer näher! In diesem Video decken wir auf, wie die berüchtigten Rockstar Games Leaker dem Studio unbeabsichtigt zu über einer Milliarde Dollar Aktiengewinn verholfen haben und warum diese Gratiswerbung unbezahlbar war. Außerdem verraten uns brandneue Insider-Infos endlich, wie lange wir wirklich auf den PC-Release warten müssen und in welchem Zeitraum der neue GTA 6 Online-Modus an den Start geht. Wir analysieren im Detail, warum der kommende Take-Two Earning Call im Mai der absolute Schlüsselmoment für den nächsten Trailer ist. Passend dazu schauen wir uns eine extrem realistische Marketing-Timeline der nächsten Monate an – vom Cover Reveal über die Collector's Edition bis hin zu den ersten Gameplay-Trailern. Natürlich werfen wir auch einen Blick auf die irren Einnahmen von GTA V und klären, warum die PlayStation 5 der unangefochtene VIP-Partner für Rockstar ist. Ob das Spiel sogar für die Switch 2 erscheinen könnte und welches versteckte Detail Jasons wahre Stärke verrät, erfahrt ihr ebenfalls hier. Lasst uns gemeinsam die Wartezeit verkürzen und in den Kommentaren diskutieren, was uns bis zum großen Release erwartet!

Hey und willkommen! 
In meinen Videos tauchen wir tief in die Welt von GTA 6 ein und beleuchten alle aktuellen Leaks, Spekulationen und offiziellen Informationen rund um das heiß ersehnte Spiel! Wir analysieren detailliert die neuesten Gerüchte, diskutieren mögliche Schauplätze, Charaktere und Gameplay-Features und schauen uns an, welche offiziellen Fakten Rockstar Games bereits bestätigt hat. Außerdem werfen wir einen Blick auf Insider-Informationen und geben unsere Einschätzungen dazu ab, was uns in Grand Theft Auto VI erwarten könnte. Wenn du kein Detail verpassen willst, abonnier den Kanal und aktiviere die Glocke! Viel Spaß beim Zuschauen!
